summary.what: Add TestExplainPending covering every Reason value
summary.why: ExplainPending and the pending --explain CLI shipped in v0.22.5 with no unit tests — flagged by the deep review pass as a testing-strategy violation. The function is the user-facing answer to 'why isn't this commit pending?' and any drift between it and the underlying gate would silently mislead operators verifying their .timbersignore rules. Tests are required to anchor the contract.
summary.how: Table-driven coverage for every Reason value classifyCommit can return (keep, infra, author, message, documented, ack, revert, merge-empty). The revert case needed a 12-char hex SHA to satisfy minRevertSHALen and shaInSet. A second test (PairsEveryCommit) confirms ExplainPending returns ClassifiedCommit slices 1:1 with input — a regression that dropped skipped commits would defeat the whole point of --explain.
